title: Kimi K2.6 and Agent Swarm explained..
summary: Kimi K2.6 is a coding-focused LLM released by MoonShot AI that improves on K2.5 for long-running tasks and agent swarm applications. The model represents maturation in Chinese AI labs toward more stable and comprehensive LLMs.
